title: Design System: Nur — The Noble Qur'an

display.purpose: Cormorant Garamond hero titles and the Nur wordmark; airy and generously tracked.

arabic.purpose: Amiri Qur'anic verses, duas, and dhikr; the protagonist of every screen.

body.purpose: Inter translations and supporting copy; cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Inter uppercase wide-tracked eyebrows and nav links (not citations — those are serif).

shadows.name: lantern-glow
shadows.purpose: Faint gold halo on focused or featured elements; ambient, never structural.

shadows.name: inset-highlight
shadows.purpose: Top inner highlight giving glass surfaces a lit upper edge.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: List/sibling stagger entrance: translateY(16px)+opacity 0 → settle. Staggered via delay-100…delay-500. Legitimate for cards-in-a-list, not for whole-section reveals.

motion.name: fade-soft
motion.purpose: Calm, opacity-led settle (translateY 8px) for supporting copy clustered around a hero; gentler than fade-up.

motion.name: lantern-rise
motion.purpose: Signature hero reveal — the lantern resolving out of dusk: opacity + translateY(20px) + blur(10px)→0. One per view, on the dominant element.

motion.name: ease-out-soft
motion.purpose: Exponential ease-out for hover and state transitions; never linear, never bouncy.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: fade-up/fade-soft/lantern-rise resolve to their visible end-state instantly. Content is never gated on motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold pill CTA with deep-night text; the single lit action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 0 32px; border: none; border-radius: 23px; background: oklch(0.8 0.11 85); color: oklch(0.13 0.028 261.692); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.8 0.11 85 / 0.85); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.8 0.11 85 / 0.4); }

components.name: Ghost Nav Link
components.description: Low-emphasis uppercase nav link; ink-muted at rest, lights to gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 23px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.707 0.022 261.325); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.8 0.11 85); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.8 0.11 85 / 0.4); }

components.name: Devotional Card
components.description: Signature glass plate of night carrying sacred text: gold glyph, RTL Arabic centerpiece, an upright near-Ink translation that leads, a quieter gold transliteration, and a serif normal-case citation footer.
components.html:
❖

رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا

My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

Rabbi zidnī ʿilmā.

Qur'ān 20:114
components.css: .ds-dua-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; padding: 32px 24px; border-radius: 23px; background: oklch(0.21 0.034 264.665 / 0.4); border: 1px solid oklch(0.8 0.11 85 / 0.2); transition: background 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), border-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-dua-card:hover { background: oklch(0.21 0.034 264.665 / 0.6); border-color: oklch(0.8 0.11 85 / 0.4); } .ds-dua-glyph { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 20px; color: oklch(0.65 0.08 85 / 0.2); font-size: 1.5rem; user-select: none; } .ds-dua-arabic { margin: 0; text-align: right; font-family: Amiri, serif; font-size: 1.875rem; line-height: 2.1; color: oklch(0.985 0.002 247.839); } .ds-dua-translation { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.625; text-wrap: pretty; color: oklch(0.985 0.002 247.839 / 0.9); } .ds-dua-translit { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.65 0.08 85 / 0.8); } .ds-dua-ref { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-dua-rule { width: 24px; height: 1px; background: oklch(0.8 0.11 85 / 0.4); } .ds-dua-cite { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-style: normal; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.025em; color: oklch(0.65 0.08 85); }

components.name: Search Trigger
components.description: Quiet translucent search trigger with an inline shortcut hint; opens a dialog.
components.css: .ds-search { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 320px; max-width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 7px; background: oklch(0.21 0.034 264.665 / 0.2); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-search:hover { border-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.25); } .ds-search-icon { width: 13px; height: 13px; color: oklch(0.707 0.022 261.325 / 0.6); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-search-ph { flex: 1; text-align: left; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.707 0.022 261.325 / 0.5); } .ds-search-kbd { padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.1); border-radius: 4px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 9px; color: oklch(0.707 0.022 261.325 / 0.5); }

components.name: Section Eyebrow
components.description: Wide-tracked uppercase muted-gold section label, paired with a hairline rule.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-eyebrow-text { flex-shrink: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.65 0.08 85); } .ds-eyebrow-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: oklch(0.65 0.08 85 / 0.2); }

components.name: Ornamental Divider
components.description: Signature symmetrical mark: two hairline rules flanking a small gold glyph.
components.css: .ds-divider { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 160px; } .ds-divider-rule { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: oklch(0.65 0.08 85 / 0.25); } .ds-divider-glyph { color: oklch(0.65 0.08 85 / 0.6); font-size: 0.75rem; }

narrative.overview: Nur is a warm light held in deep night. The whole system rests on a single image: a lantern glowing gold against a blue-black evening sky — luminous, intimate, unhurried. The surface is a deep night, and warmth arrives the way it does after sunset: not from a bright page, but from a small, deliberate source of gold light. The register is brand: the feel leads. Every screen is a frame for scripture and worship — the Arabic and its meaning take center stage, and the interface recedes around them. The system is warm without compromising reverence and welcoming to every level. It explicitly rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, the austere intimidating register of cold religiosity, and the cluttered density of legacy Quran apps.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-night ground with a single luminous gold light source.
Serif-led, editorial calm; Arabic script given room to breathe.
Tonal depth and gentle glow instead of hard shadows.
Slow, exponential fade-up motion; never bouncy, never busy.
Whitespace as reverence; the words always come first.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only accent. There is exactly one light source on screen; if a second competing accent appears, the lantern metaphor breaks. Status and emphasis are carried by gold, weight, and opacity — not by a second hue.

rules.name: The Glass-Over-Night Rule
rules.body: Cards never sit on an opaque fill. Surfaces are the night seen through glass (bg-surface/40–/60); the dusk always shows through.

rules.name: The Arabic-Breathes Rule
rules.body: Arabic script is never set tighter than line-height 2.0. Diacritics must never crowd. Legibility of the sacred text is non-negotiable.

rules.name: The No-Hard-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Forbidden: shadow-md, shadow-lg, or any rgba(0,0,0,...) drop shadow. Elevation is glow and tone.

dos: Do keep gold as the single light source — one accent, spent deliberately (The One Light Rule).
Do set surfaces as glass over night (bg-surface/40–/60), with gold hairline borders.
Do give Arabic the most room on any screen; line-height ≥ 2.0, never crowd diacritics.
Do convey depth with glow and tone, not shadow (Lantern Glow, hairlines, surah-glow).
Do use slow, exponential fade-up entrances with prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks; stagger lists, don't apply one identical reflex everywhere.
Do keep off-white Ink for text (never pure white) and verify Ink-Muted clears 4.5:1 on the night ground.
donts: Don't make any screen read as a generic SaaS dashboard — no stat-card grids, KPI tiles, big-number hero metrics, or charty framing.
Don't drift austere or intimidating — no cold, severe, gatekeeping religiosity. Warmth is mandatory.
Don't introduce a second accent hue. No blue links, green success, or colored status chips; status is gold, weight, and opacity.
Don't use teal as a foreground color — it lives only in the background glow.
Don't use hard drop shadows (shadow-md/shadow-lg/rgba(0,0,0,...)). Forbidden.
Don't clutter with ornament; the only sanctioned decoration is the ❖ glyph and the ornamental divider.
Don't let the interface compete with the text — the words come first, always.
